title: Athlete's Guide to Beating Nail Fungus with 8 Herbal Tinctures
description: Thymus vulgaris tinctures, also known as thyme tincture, may be helpful in treating nail fungus due to its antifungal properties. Thyme contains compounds like thymol, carvacrol, and limonene, which have been shown to inhibit the growth of fungi and bacteria. These constituents work by disrupting the cell membranes of fungal organisms, ultimately leading to their death.
